mapper.select: SELECT id, skill_name, description, skill_path, is_enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM skill_config ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO skill_config (skill_name, description, skill_path, is_enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{skillName}, #{description}, #{skillPath}, #{isEnabled}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE skill_config SET skill_name = #{skillName}, description = #{description}, skill_path = #{skillPath}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE skill_config SET is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
